summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tomich Gestão de Mídia admin controls and voting system. All backend API tests passed (13/13). Frontend UI working correctly for both admin and regular users.
passed_tests: BACKEND: Admin user auth/me returns is_admin=true
BACKEND: Regular user auth/me returns is_admin=false
BACKEND: Admin voting-stats returns is_admin=true, can_vote=true
BACKEND: Regular user voting-stats returns is_admin=false
BACKEND: Members list includes is_admin and can_vote fields
BACKEND: Admin can update member is_admin and can_vote permissions
BACKEND: Admin can reset votes on approval (POST /api/admin/approvals/{id}/reset-votes)
BACKEND: Regular user cannot reset votes (returns 403)
BACKEND: Admin can revoke individual votes (POST /api/admin/approvals/{id}/revoke-vote)
BACKEND: Regular user cannot revoke votes (returns 403)
BACKEND: Admin can delete approval (DELETE /api/admin/approvals/{id})
BACKEND: Regular user cannot delete approval (returns 403)
BACKEND: User with can_vote=true can vote on approvals
FRONTEND: Members page shows 'Admin' badges for admin members
FRONTEND: Members page shows 'Pode Votar' badges for voting members
FRONTEND: Member edit dialog has is_admin switch (Administrador)
FRONTEND: Member edit dialog has can_vote switch (Pode Votar)
FRONTEND: Approvals page shows 'Modo Admin' badge for admin users
FRONTEND: Approvals page shows admin instructions banner
FRONTEND: Approvals page shows dropdown menu (⋮) on cards for admin
FRONTEND: Dropdown menu has 'Reiniciar Votação' option
FRONTEND: Dropdown menu has 'Excluir Aprovação' option (red/destructive)
FRONTEND: Regular user does NOT see 'Modo Admin' badge
FRONTEND: Regular user does NOT see dropdown menu on approval cards
FRONTEND: Vote buttons (Aprovar/Rejeitar) visible for users with can_vote
FRONTEND: Voting successfully registers and updates UI
FRONTEND: Progress bar shows correct voting percentage
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Used existing test users and approvals.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin control features are working correctly. The system properly enforces admin-only access to reset votes, revoke votes, and delete approvals. Member permission switches (is_admin, can_vote) work correctly in the UI. The voting system correctly counts only voters with can_vote=true permission.

test_summary_by_feature.google_login: Login page with Google auth button loads correctly
test_summary_by_feature.members_badges: Admin and 'Pode Votar' badges display correctly
test_summary_by_feature.member_permissions_edit: is_admin and can_vote switches visible and functional in edit dialog
test_summary_by_feature.approvals_admin_badge: 'Modo Admin' badge shows for admin users only
test_summary_by_feature.approvals_dropdown_menu: Three-dot menu with reset/delete options shows for admin only
test_summary_by_feature.reset_voting: API endpoint working, UI dropdown option available
test_summary_by_feature.revoke_vote: API endpoint working (not tested via UI - requires existing votes)
test_summary_by_feature.delete_approval: API endpoint working, UI dropdown option available
test_summary_by_feature.voting_system: Correctly counts only can_vote=true users, progress bar working
